Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The user wants me to analyze an event log of an Insurance Claims Processing process to identify cases with performance issues and deduce the root causes based on attributes like Resource Region and Complexity

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Step 1 Calculate the duration of each case

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 2001 Duration 1 hour 30 minutes Region A Complexity Low

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 2002 Duration 25 hours 55 minutes or 1 day 1 hour 55 minutes Region B Complexity Medium Has 1 Request Additional Documents

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 2003 Duration 2 days 20 minutes Region A Complexity High Has 2 Request Additional Documents

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 2004 Duration 1 hour 25 minutes Region B Complexity Low

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 2005 Duration 3 days 5 hours 5 minutes Region B Complexity High Has 3 Request Additional Documents

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Longest cases 2005 approx 3 days 5 hours 2003 approx 2 days 2002 approx 1 day Fastest cases 2001 and 2004 approx 1 point 5 hours Clearly cases 2003 and 2005 are taking significantly longer with 2002 also taking longer than the low complexity ones

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Complexity Low complexity cases 2001 2004 are completed in 1 point 5 hours without additional document requests Medium complexity 2002 takes 26 hours with 1 document request High complexity 2003 2005 take 2 to 3 days with multiple document requests

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Resource Adjuster Lisa handles 2002 2004 2005 Mike handles 2001 2003 Both handle high medium complexity Manager Bill approves high complexity claims 2003 2005 Manager Ann approves low and medium

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Region Both Region A and B have fast low complexity and slow high complexity cases So Region does not seem to be a primary root cause though 2005 in Region B is the slowest

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Root Cause 1 High Complexity Claims High complexity leads to multiple Request Additional Documents loops drastically increasing lead time

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Root Cause 2 Adjuster efficiency or processing of additional documents When Adjuster Lisa requests additional documents Case 2005 it happens 3 times taking almost 2 days just in that loop

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Mitigation Better initial documentation collection for high complexity claims dedicated teams for high complexity claims clearer checklists for initial submission to avoid multiple loops
